zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Perpoynt於大約1521年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England42歲，母親Margaret Abigail Reed-33歲。她於大約1540年與Henry Sherman在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1580年10月14日之前在英國艾可迪德哈姆，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Perpoynt was born about 1521, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England, was 42 and her mother, Margaret Abigail Reed, was -33. She married Henry Sherman about 1540, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 14 October 1580, in Dedham, Essex, England, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Perpoynt est née environ 1521, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margaret Abigail Reed, avait -33 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Sherman environ 1540, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 14 octobre 1580, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Perpoynt um 1521 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England 42 und ihre Mutter Margaret Abigail Reed -33. Sie hat um 1540 in Dedham, Essex, England Henry Sherman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 14. Oktober 1580 in Dedham, Essex, England und wurde in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Perpoynt è nata il circa 1521 nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Margaret Abigail Reed, aveva -33 anni. Lei sposato Henry Sherman circa 1540, nel Dedham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 14 ottobre 1580, nel Dedham, Essex, England, e fu sepolta a Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Perpoyntが約1521年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, Englandは42歳，母Margaret Abigail Reedは-33歳であった。約1540年にイギリスエセックスデドハムでHenry Shermanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1580年10月14日以前にイギリスエセックスデドハムで死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Perpoynt(이)가 대략 1521년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Abigail Reed(은)는 -33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1540년 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Henry Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1580년 10월 14일 이전 영국 에세스 데드함에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Perpoynt nasceu aproximadamente 1521, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Abigail Reed, tinha -33 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Sherman aproximadamente 1540, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 14 de outubro de 1580, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Perpoynt родилась около 1521 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Perpoynt of Dedham, England было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Abigail Reed, -33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Sherman около 1540 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 14 октябрь 1580 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия и была похоронена в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
